blended.narrative: Grand Targhee is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 7,218 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 7" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions. Models disagree — check back.

recent_conditions.narrative: 7.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 63".
